title: IDCardM
description: A lightweight mod that introduces player ID cards with data storage, networking, and GUI support.
body:
# IDCardM Guide (Fabric 1.21.1)

## Overview
IDCardM is an RP identity/database mod with:
- Card items: `id`, `license`, `boss`, `gym_leader`, `custom`
- Agency role GUIs: JPJ, POLIS, JPN, Pokemon League
- Retail helper: 7EleBen tablet (`7e_tablet`)
- First-time onboarding profile (`birthday`, `citizenship`, `height`)
- Dedicated tablets: `jpj_tablet`, `jpn_tablet`, `polis_tablet`, `admin_tablet`, `idm_tablet`
- Private result messages for requester, plus targeted notices (for summons)

## Quick Start
1. Give a player card or tablet:
   - `/idcardm give <player> id`
   - `/idcardm give <player> admin_tablet`
   - `/idcardm give <player> jpj_tablet`
   - `/idcardm give <player> jpn_tablet`
   - `/idcardm give <player> polis_tablet`
2. Set agency/editor roles (OP):
   - `/idcardm agency jpn add <player>`
   - `/idcardm editor add <player>`
3. Open menu:
   - Right-click dedicated tablet for direct UI
   - `idm_tablet` opens agency menu
   - `/idcardm dbgui` opens agency menu (requires role/admin)

## Core Commands
- `/idcardm commands`
- `/idcardm guide <1-6>`
- `/idcardm guidebook`
- `/idcardm give <player> <id|license|boss|gym_leader|custom|admin_tablet|jpj_tablet|jpn_tablet|polis_tablet|7e_tablet|idm_tablet>`
- `/idcardm setfield <player> <type> <field> <value>`
- `/idcardm setphoto <player> <type> <url>`

## Agency Commands (OP)
- `/idcardm agency jpj add/remove <player> | list`
- `/idcardm agency polis add/remove <player> | list`
- `/idcardm agency jpn add/remove <player> | list`
- `/idcardm agency 7e add/remove <player> | list`
- `/idcardm agency pokemon add/remove <player> | list`

## Record Queries
- `/idcardm records <id|license|gym> <player> [page] [filter]`

## In-Game Behavior
- Card right-click: display card details to nearby players
- Shift + right-click: self preview only
- No blur screen for card display
- If someone picks your dropped card, they can read the owner info stored in that card item

## Access Rules
- Tablet UI open is available to all players.
- Backend actions still enforce agency role permissions.
- `/idcardm dbgui` still requires agency/editor/admin role.
- JPJ uses 3 focused menus: `KELUAR LESEN`, `PERBAHARUI`, `SEMAK/SAMAN`
- 7EleBen topup requires role: `/idcardm agency 7e add <player>`
- POLIS can check ID/criminal flags
- JPN can register citizen ID
- Pokemon League can manage gym leader card flow

## Data Files
- `config/idcardm_cards.json`
- `config/idcardm_permissions.json`
- `config/idcardm_agency_permissions.json`
- `config/idcardm_agency_services.json`
- `config/idcardm_audit.log`

## Release Note
- Requires Java 21 runtime for the mod/toolchain on 1.21.1.
- Compatible with ModernFix and FerriteCore (optional optimization mods).
- Legacy card data is auto-updated on load/login.
- 7E staff tablet flow is now simplified (click-first, less cluttered, drag-to-pay slot).
- POLIS kiosk uses updated white body with blue front display.
- SISPA kiosk visual is cleaner with beacon removed.
- Current finalized version: `1.0.5`.
